title: Bridge Essay: Default mode network connectivity contributes the augment effect stress recovery

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Ecology/Animism** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Nature connectedness — biophilia hypothesis, nature neuroscience, environmental neuroscience.

**Default mode network connectivity contributes the augment effect stress recovery by natural viewing.**. Neurobiol Stress.. PMID: 41035458. DOI: 10.1016/j.ynstr.2025.100759. The psychological benefits of exposure to natural environments are well established. However, whether simply viewing nature images produce similar restorative effects and the brain mechanisms involved remain unclear.
